arts.ttl: Declan Rice girlfriend, Chelsea snub, West Ham deal, Frank Lampard offer and Arsenal transfer
arts.sum: The 26-year-old midfielder scored two brilliant free-kicks at the Emirates Stadium on Tuesday night, leading Arsenal to a 3-0 win over Real Madrid in the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinal. So, with that being said, football.london has rounded up everything you need to know about Rice and his meteoric rise to superstardom.

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta’s ‘sad’ admission he made over quitting club - ‘I was suffering’ - football.london
arts.sum: It showcased exactly how, in the five-and-a-half years since Arteta took over as Arsenal's head coach, he has taken a struggling football club to the pinnacle of European football with back-to-back Champions League quarter-final appearances. "Listen, the relationship between me and Pep is incredibly good," said the former Arsenal midfielder in 2020.

arts.ttl: I was really surprised by Arsenal transfer decision after talk with £40m striker's agent
arts.sum: Arsenal are set to welcome Brentford to the Emirates Stadium for a Premier League clash on Saturday evening, but there's an alternate reality where Ivan Toney could have been spearheading the Gunners' attack against his former club, after they nearly secured his signature last summer. Despite strong links with Toney, the striker made a £40million switch to Saudi Pro League club Al-Ahli in August 2024.

arts.ttl: Is Arsenal vs Brentford on TV? How to watch the game, channel details, live stream
arts.sum: So, with that being said, football.london has rounded-up everything you need to know about Arsenal's Saturday evening clash with Brentford; Arsenal vs Brentford will kick-off at 5.30pm (GMT) at the Emirates Stadium on Saturday, April 12.

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Brentford line-ups: Janelt in for Bees
arts.sum: Brentford make just one change from the side which drew with Chelsea – Vitaly Janelt comes into the midfield, with Yehor Yarmoliuk dropping to the bench. Gustavo Nunes, in the squad after his injury lay-off, is on the bvench. Arsenal: Raya, Partey, Saliba, Kiwior, Tierney, Jorginho, Zinchenko, Rice, Nwaneri, Martinelli, Trossard. arts.ttl: Arsenal 'are preparing £35m bid for Real Madrid starlet' who has struggled for minutes under Carlo Ancelotti
arts.sum: Arsenal are lining up a £35million bid for a Real Madrid star who has struggled for game time under Carlo Ancelotti this season, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms Real Madrid injury boost for Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Saturday confirmed some altogether positive personnel news in his squad. This comes amid confirmation that Dani Ceballos is back available for selection.…

arts.ttl: Key players that will miss Real Madrid's second-leg Champions League tie with Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set be without several key members of their squad for next week's huge Champions League clash with Arsenal. The Gunners, who hold an impressive 3-0 lead in the tie following the first leg, also have plenty of injury woes but will be happy to learn of Carlo Ancelotti's woes.
